title: centaurea dumortieri
intro: Centaurea dumortieri, also known as Rough Chervil or Dumortier's Centaury, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion-like family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a diuretic due to its high content of inulin and other compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as aiding in weight loss, reducing inflammation, and providing antioxidant properties. Centaurea dumortieri is often prepared as a herbal tea or used in infusions, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical products.
